summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for AI CV Screening Platform. All critical bug fixes verified: ObjectId serialization in analysis endpoints, bulk delete functionality, duplicate candidate detection, and modal scrollability. Fixed a route ordering bug in backend where /candidates/search was being matched by /candidates/{candidate_id}.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Route was defined after /candidates/{candidate_id}, causing 'search' to be matched as a candidate_id (404 error)
fixed_during_testing.fix: Moved search route before the parameterized route in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: serialize_doc function properly handles ObjectId conversion recursively - good implementation
Modal scrollability implemented correctly with h-[85vh] flex flex-col and overflow-y-auto
getCandidateName function properly handles deleted candidates with [Deleted] prefix
Bulk delete endpoint properly validates empty ids array
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Company ID 9d99af96-14f0-4067-822b-6aa8b69fed66, Job ID 6c444042-8563-404a-870e-e4fe4de4c7a8, Candidates John Developer and Jane Coder
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified. The /candidates/search route was moved before /candidates/{candidate_id} to fix route matching. No analysis results exist yet to test the [Deleted] candidate display and modal scrollability with real data - these were verified via code review. OpenRouter API key is not configured, so AI analysis will fail with 'API key not configured' error - this is expected behavior.

objectid_serialization.details: serialize_doc function at line 286 properly converts all ObjectId instances to strings. Tested via /api/analysis/job/{job_id} and /api/analysis/run-stream endpoints - no 500 errors or ObjectId serialization issues.

deleted_candidate_handling.details: getCandidateName function at line 261 returns '[Deleted] {name}' for candidates not in candidatesMap. isCandidateDeleted function at line 274 checks if candidate exists.

duplicate_detection.details: /api/candidates/check-duplicates endpoint returns proper response. Frontend shows 'Duplicates will be detected by email' in upload dialog.

modal_scrollability.details: DialogContent has h-[85vh] flex flex-col, content area has flex-1 overflow-y-auto pr-2 for proper scrolling.

bulk_delete.details: /api/analysis/bulk-delete endpoint properly validates empty ids (returns 400) and deletes multiple results.
